subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God unto him who hath been imprisoned even as the Manifestation of the Cause was imprisoned in the path of God, the All-Subduing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الله الی الذی سجن کما سجن مظهر الامر فی سبیل الله المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @thankfulness; gratitude, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wisdom [hikmat], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
